description: Reconcile updated IM2 curriculum (module renaming, new lessons) and new IM1 curriculum (93 lessons) with seed data, Convex schema, and standards. Phase 15 remediation completed: fixed slug mismatches, regenerated activity maps, cleaned deprecated files.
deviation_notes: Phase 15 added post-review to fix 4 critical issues (slug mismatches in IM1 M6/M8/M13 and IM2 M5, orphaned IM2 activity-map, incomplete IM1 activity-map, invalid JSON in class-period-package) and 3 major cleanup items (71 old seed files, units.ts in both apps, track status reconciliation).
